Kadir Has University

Radio, Television and Cinema

Kadir Has University Department of Radio, Television and Cinema aims to train media professionals with creative and free thinking. The department, which provides education in English, provides universal values and contemporary competencies with the basic programme in the first year; starting from the second year, it switches to a project-based education model with industry experts. Students gain hands-on experience with facilities such as the RTS Studio equipped with advanced technical equipment, editing room and KHAS Radio. Graduates can work in various positions such as director, screenwriter, producer in television channels, film production companies and digital content production areas.
